--- title: "1995-03 Dashboard" subtitle: "Monthly Dashboard for Beer sold at Dominick's: March 1995" draft: true format: html: toc: true toc-expand: 2 categories: - Dominicks - Beer - GEKS --- # Overview ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: # Diagnostics ## Analytical (output) diagnostics ## Input diagnostics Churn over time - plotting products (`NITEM`) entering the sample, products staying (compared to the previuous period) and products leaveing the sample (i.e. not seen this month). ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: ## Monitoring / data validation ### Weeks in scope The following weeks' data was used a input for the last month. ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
